    # We also need to keep track of the number of blocks in each row to determine when the row fills up

    # We'll precompute the removal time for each Y-value (row)

    # To avoid full simulation, we can approximate the removal time as the sum of the counts of blocks that fall into the same or lower rows

    # Assuming that the block falls downward until it reaches a completely filled row

    # This is equivalent to checking if the block was not removed by time T
